message:
feat(resize): add wrap quality config knobs, ft status --resize dashboard, and test coverage

Config (frankenterm.toml):
- New Resize Reflow Quality section: scorecard_enabled, readability gate,
  max_line_badness_delta (500), max_total_badness_delta (2000),
  max_fallback_ratio_percent (20), commented KP cost model tuning knobs

Config tests (toml_config.rs):
- resize_wrap_scorecard_config_loads, kp_cost_model_config_loads,
  defaults_when_not_specified, fallback_ratio_percent_clamped

CLI (main.rs):
- Add --resize flag to ft status subcommand showing resize quality
  dashboard (scorecard, gate, watchdog) in JSON or plain text format
- JSON mode extracts resize_control_plane, watchdog, degradation_ladder
  from watcher status with process-global fallbacks

Promise (spawn.rs):
- sleep_waits_at_least_requested_duration test
- sleep_zero_duration_completes test

E2E (e2e_gui_bootstrap.sh):
- Fix --skip-build to return exit code 125 (skip) via mark_skip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,6 +63,33 @@ tab_bar_at_bottom = false
 name = "local"
 connect_automatically = false
 
+# --- Resize Reflow Quality ---
+
+# Enable wrap-quality scorecard telemetry during terminal resize.
+# Tracks per-line wrap quality to detect bad reflows.
+resize_wrap_scorecard_enabled = true
+
+# Enable readability gate: reject reflows that produce unreadable output.
+# When gate triggers, falls back to simpler (greedy) wrapping strategy.
+resize_wrap_readability_gate_enabled = true
+
+# Max per-line badness delta vs greedy baseline before gate triggers.
+# Lower = stricter. 0 = disabled (any badness triggers fallback).
+resize_wrap_readability_max_line_badness_delta = 500
+
+# Max aggregate badness delta across all lines before gate triggers.
+resize_wrap_readability_max_total_badness_delta = 2000
+
+# Max percent of lines allowed to use fallback wrapping (0-100).
+# 20 = at most 20% of lines can fall back before gate rejects the reflow.
+resize_wrap_readability_max_fallback_ratio_percent = 20
+
+# KP cost model tuning (advanced — defaults are good for most use cases)
+# resize_wrap_kp_badness_scale = 10000
+# resize_wrap_kp_forced_break_penalty = 5000
+# resize_wrap_kp_lookahead_limit = 64
+# resize_wrap_kp_max_dp_states = 8192
+
 # --- Performance ---
 
 # Frame rate cap

@@ -133,8 +133,8 @@ require_rch() {
 
 build_gui() {
   if [[ "$SKIP_BUILD" -eq 1 ]]; then
-    log "build skipped by --skip-build"
-    return 0
+    mark_skip "--skip-build set"
+    return 125
   fi
   if ! require_rch; then
     log "rch not found at '$RCH_BIN'"
